title: Software Engineer
description:
Dreamwell is a technology company building software that helps brands and creators collaborate more effectively in the modern digital economy.
 



  





 We’re a small, fast\\-moving team focused on building thoughtful software and solving real problems. As we grow, we’re looking for engineers who enjoy building systems, working across the stack, and contributing to products from early stages.
 



  





 If you like working in environments where you can move quickly, take ownership, and help shape how systems are built, you’ll feel right at home.
 



  





 What You’ll Do
 



  





 • Design, build, and maintain core systems that power our platform
 



 • Work across both backend and frontend depending on project needs
 



 • Build APIs, services, and application logic used by our product and internal tools
 



 • Collaborate with product and design to turn ideas into working features
 



 • Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-tested code
 



 • Improve system performance, reliability, and scalability
 



 • Contribute to architectural decisions as the platform evolves
 



  





 Tech Stack
 



  





 Our stack is modern and pragmatic. Core technologies include:
 



  





 • TypeScript
 



 • Python
 



 • React
 



 • A variety of supporting infrastructure and developer tools depending on the project
 



  





 We’re also building systems involving AI agents, agentic workflows, and MCP\\-style tool integrations, so engineers interested in modern AI\\-native architectures will find plenty of interesting problems to work on.
 



  





 We care less about specific frameworks and more about engineers who can learn quickly, adapt to new tools, and build solid systems.
 



  





 What We’re Looking For
 



  





 • Strong experience building production software
 



 • Comfortable working in TypeScript and/or Python environments
 



 • Experience building web applications, APIs, or backend systems
 



 • Solid problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail
 



 • Ability to work independently in a remote environment
 



 • Comfortable working in a fast\\-moving startup environment
 



 • Interest in learning new tools and technologies as the platform evolves
 



  





 Nice to Have
 



  





 • Experience with React or modern frontend frameworks
 



 • Experience building AI\\-powered systems, agents, or automation workflows
 



 • Familiarity with LLM APIs or agent frameworks
 



 • Experience working with distributed systems or cloud infrastructure
 



 • Startup experience or experience working in small teams
 



  





 Work Style
 



  





 • Fully remote role
 



 • Flexible working hours with asynchronous collaboration
 



 • Small team environment with high ownership
 



 • Opportunity to help shape the direction of systems as they are built
 



  





 About Dreamwell
 



  





 Dreamwell is building technology designed to improve how brands and creators work together.
 



  





 We’re backed by experienced investors and operators and are focused on building durable software that solves real problems.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Cloud & Application Engineering
description:

* Develop interactive and responsive user interfaces using frameworks like Angular , React , or Vue . js .

* Certification in Java or fullstack development technologies is a plus.

title: Software Engineer, Amazon
description:
**Description**
 At Amazon, we hire the best minds in technology to innovate and build on behalf of our customers. The focus we have on our customers is why we are one of the world’s most beloved brands – customer obsession is part of our company DNA. Our Software Development Engineers (SDEs) use cutting\\-edge technology to solve complex problems and get to see the impact of their work first\\-hand. The challenges SDEs solve for at Amazon are big and influence millions of customers, sellers, and products around the world. We are looking for individuals who are passionate about creating new products, features, and services from scratch while managing ambiguity and the pace of a company where development cycles are measured in weeks, not years. If this sounds interesting to you, apply and come chart your own path at Amazon.
   

  

 Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. For an update on your status, or to confirm your application was submitted successfully, please login to your candidate portal. NOTE: Amazon works with a high volume of applicants, so we appreciate your patience as we review applications

title: R & D Engineer
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 R\\&D Team Lead
   

  

  

  

  

**Your role and responsibilities:**
 In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB’s success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research \\& Development (R\\&D) team.
   

  

 The work model for the role is:
   

  

 This role is contributing to the
 **Motion Business Drive Products Division in Bangalore, India**
**You will be mainly accountable for:**
* Working as an independent and reliable contributor in R\\&D projects with limited supervision.
* Performing various tasks in the assigned area (e.g., mechanics, electronics, thermal, software), from building concepts, gathering requirements to designing, implementing, integrating, testing, technology transfer or maintenance, and operations.
* Understanding and applying applicable processes, standards, guidelines, and requirements, including architectural and design constraints.
* Driving the achievement of assigned targets (quality, time, scope, cost) and raising and addressing risks.
* Understanding of Power Electronics device, Drives, PLCs \\& software tools to configure them.
* Good to have knowledge of network communication and configuration.
* Knowledge in configuring \\& setup of power electronic device through PC Tools


**Qualifications for the role:**
* B.E/B\\-Tech/ME/MTech in Computer Science, Electronics, Electrical, Instrumentation with 3 to 8 years of Software development experience with C\\+\\+ / C\\#, .NET Framework, Microsoft WPF
* Strong and Hands\\-on Experience in Windows Application Development using Microsoft Technologies
* Strong concepts on Advanced C\\+\\+/ C\\#, .Net , OOPS, LINQ
* Strong knowledge of TypeScript, JavaScript including practical experience with JavaScript frameworks, ideally vue.js
* Experience in Design Patterns, Design Principles and WPF (Windows Presentation Foundation), MVVM, Windows Application Development
* Experience in NSubstitute \\& Basics of ASP.Net, Angular JS with Scrum Processes
* Experience in end\\-to\\-end product development using SDLC practices


**More about us:**
 ABB Motion provides pioneering technology, products, solutions and related services to industrial customers to increase energy efficiency, improve safety and reliability, and maintain precise control over processes. The portfolio includes motors, generators and drives for a wide range of applications in all industrial sectors.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

* Work closely with Product, Design, and other engineers to break down complex user problems and build components that are technically strong and practically useful for teams building on top of them.


**What You Will Need**

* Proficiency in building scalable backend services. Experience with Python, Django, Golang, MongoDB, and AWS is highly preferred.

title: Specialist - SAP-SAP ABAP
description:
**Job Description**
 As a Senior Software Engineer specializing in SAP ABAP, you will play a crucial role in designing and developing cutting\\-edge software solutions for our enterprise clients. Your expertise will be instrumental in enhancing our SAP systems, ensuring they are scalable, efficient, and aligned with the latest industry standards. Working closely with cross\\-functional teams, you will collaborate to deliver timely and innovative solutions, driving our company's success in the SAP domain.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design and develop SAP ABAP solutions, ensuring high\\-quality code and adherence to best practices.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical specifications.
* Enhance and maintain existing SAP ABAP applications, ensuring optimal performance and scalability.
* Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to junior team members.
* Stay updated with the latest SAP technologies and trends, contributing to the company's technical roadmap.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex SAP ABAP issues, providing timely support to internal and external stakeholders.
* Document and communicate technical designs, ensuring clear and concise documentation for future reference.
* Mentor and guide junior developers, fostering a culture of knowledge sharing and continuous improvement.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* 5\\+ years of experience in SAP ABAP development, with a strong understanding of SAP architecture and design principles.
* Proficiency in ABAP programming, including OOP concepts, and experience with SAP UI5/Fiori development.
* Knowledge of SAP HANA and S/4HANA is highly preferred.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and the ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
* Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non\\-technical stakeholders.
* Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git) and continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) practices.
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies is an advantage.
* Ability to work in a fast\\-paced, dynamic environment and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
* A proactive and self\\-motivated attitude, with a passion for learning and staying updated with emerging technologies.
